title: lotodes thomii
intro: Lotodes thomii, also known as water convolvulus or water spinach, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotodes thomii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural diuretic. Lotodes thomii can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, or used raw in salads and stir-fries.
